chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1635 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.12.2021 Mr. Bashir Ahmed Almani advocate for petitioner along with petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G. along with SIP Muhammad Sulleman Lashari PS Nasim Nagar Qasimabad, Hyderabad. -.-.-. By means of this petition, petitioner has requested to constitute a Joint Investigation Team to investigate the cases registered against her brother namely Dilawar with further directions not to register any FIR against him. SIP Muhammad Sulleman Lashari PS Nasim Nagar Qasimabad, Hyderabad, has appeared along with a report and submits that petitioner’s brother is implicated in so many cases not only at PS Nasim Nagar but at police stations across Sindh in different districts. Further, petitioner’s brother is a criminal type person and recently in a police encounter he was arrested and from him a robbed car was recovered. We have heard learned counsel for the petitioner. He has not been able to satisfy under what law JIT shall be constituted and what are the special circumstances which justify the arrangement to be made which otherwise is not provided in Criminal Procedure Code. No case therefore for indulgence under Article 199 of the Constitution is made out. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
